notes: Frozen / applicable_false: Mistral Vibe has no automatic mid-turn provider/model failover (only same-provider backoff retry → turn-level RateLimitError), so the scenario's defining behavior is absent from the agent; and even a hypothetical failover is unobservable (daemon reads ModelName only from meta.json config.active_model, which is not mutated on failover, and the JSONL carries no provider field). No phases — documentation-only cell. Observable subsets covered by turn-aborted-by-error (2.14), model-identification (5.2), model-switch-midsession (5.3).
